title: tragopogon major subsp. dubius
intro: Tragopogon major subsp. dubius, also known as the lesser sowthistle, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Tragopogon major subsp. dubius can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
